items.name: gitignore
items.title: Gitignore
items.description: Generate or repair a .gitignore tailored to the project's actual stacks, frameworks, OS, and editors, and untrack files that are already committed but should be ignored. Flags secrets/build/dependency files that slipped into the repo. Use when creating, fixing, or auditing .gitignore.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
